    D

    DECIMAL_FIELD - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Decimal field (SOLOR) — same identity as TinkarTerm.DECIMAL_FIELD.
    DEFAULTS_INCEPTION - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.Ike
    The inception stamp's Defaults-and-templates-module counterpart, at the same declared time: the module dimension alone separates support content (the Data Type Defaults tuple, the worked Preferred Reviewer default) from the foundation terminology — see the live-and-die invariant on DefaultsTemplateTerm.DEFAULTS_AND_TEMPLATES_MODULE.
    DEFINITION_DESCRIPTION_TYPE - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Definition description type (SOLOR) — same identity as TinkarTerm.DEFINITION_DESCRIPTION_TYPE.

    E

    G

    GB_DIALECT_PATTERN - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    GB English dialect — same identity as TinkarTerm.GB_DIALECT_PATTERN.

    GB English dialect (SOLOR) — same identity as TinkarTerm.GB_ENGLISH_DIALECT.

    I

    IDENTIFIER_PATTERN - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Identifier Pattern — same identity as TinkarTerm.IDENTIFIER_PATTERN.
    IDENTIFIER_SOURCE - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Identifier source (SOLOR) — same identity as TinkarTerm.IDENTIFIER_SOURCE.
    IDENTIFIER_VALUE - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Identifier Value — same identity as TinkarTerm.IDENTIFIER_VALUE.
    Ike - Class in network.ike.foundation.ike.terms
    Ledger-internal handles for the IkeFoundation knowledge set: the session root and the reference handles the sections cite.
    IKE_COMMUNITY - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.Ike
    Community authorship: the IKE Network itself, attributed as author for content synthesized by tooling on the Network's behalf (starter-set ingest, IKE-Network/ike-issues#872) rather than by an individual editor or an ingested upstream source.
    IkeSource - Class in network.ike.foundation.ike.terms
    The IkeFoundation ledger's composition entry: build tooling discovers this source, composes the sections, and replays the session.
    IkeSource() - Constructor for class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeSource
    Creates the source (ServiceLoader requirement).
    IkeTerm - Class in network.ike.foundation.ike.terms
    IKE-native references for every foundational concept/pattern this ledger's own ingested content refers to — a single source of truth so the generated ledger does not depend on dev.ikm.tinkar.terms.TinkarTerm (an upstream, IKE-external binding) for identities this set already declares itself.
    IMMUTABLECOORDINATE_PROPERTIES - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    ImmutableCoordinate properties (SOLOR) — same identity as TinkarTerm.IMMUTABLECOORDINATE_PROPERTIES.
    INCEPTION - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.Ike
    The pre-release set's ONE declared inception stamp (IKE-Network/ike-issues#894): every version this ledger writes outside the Defaults and templates module carries it.
    INFERRED_DEFINITION - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Inferred Definition — same identity as TinkarTerm.INFERRED_DEFINITION.
    INSTANT_LITERAL - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Instant literal (SOLOR) — same identity as TinkarTerm.INSTANT_LITERAL.
    INTEGER_FIELD - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Integer field (SOLOR) — same identity as TinkarTerm.INTEGER_FIELD.
    IS_A - Static variable in class network.ike.foundation.ike.terms.IkeTerm
    Is-a (SOLOR) — same identity as TinkarTerm.IS_A.

    network.ike.foundation.ike.terms - module network.ike.foundation.ike.terms
    The IkeFoundation ledger: the append-only, replayable source of the Ike starter set.
    network.ike.foundation.ike.terms - package network.ike.foundation.ike.terms
